resources.string: Window Animation: %1$.2f Transition Animation: %2$.2f Animator Duration: %3$.2f
No presets saved yet. Create one from the menu!
This app requires the WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGS permission to modify system animation scales. This is a privileged permission that needs special setup.
After you grant this permission once, it stays granted permanently. You don\'t need to do it again!
You have Shizuku set up! Open this app again to automatically grant the permission.
Shizuku app is installed on your device! It can grant this permission with just one tap (see Permission Details in the menu).
Connect to a computer and run this command once:
adb shell pm grant com.arslan.customanimator android.permission.WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGS
📖 See \'Permission Details\' in the menu for complete step-by-step instructions.
Congratulations! You can now modify system animation settings directly from this app.

What does this permission do?
This privileged permission allows the app to modify system animation settings:
• Window Animation Scale (open/close animations)
• Transition Animation Scale (activity transitions)
• Animator Duration Scale (animation timing)

Without it, the app can only read current settings but cannot change them.
Note: You only need to do this ONCE. The permission\nstays granted even after closing and reopening the app or restarting the mobile.

Step 1: Enable USB Debugging
• Go to Settings > About Phone
• Tap Build Number 7 times to unlock Developer Options
• Go to Settings > Developer Options > Enable USB Debugging

Step 2: Connect to PC and Run Command
• Connect your phone to a computer with a USB cable
• Open terminal/command prompt on the computer
• Copy and run the command below (one-time only):

Step 1: Install Shizuku
• Download 'Shizuku' from Google Play Store or GitHub
• Open the app and follow initial setup
• Grant it device admin permission (one-time, in Shizuku settings)

Step 2: Grant Access to Custom Animator
• Return to this app (or restart it)
• A dialog will appear in Shizuku asking to grant permission
• Tap 'Allow' or 'Grant' to approve (takes 1 second)
• The WRITE_SECURE_SETTINGS permission is now granted
